name: File or Folder Shared With an Email Hosted on a Potentially Hostile Domain
notes: This rule triggers when a file or folder is shared with an email that is associated with hostile domains such as Spam URLs, Phishing URLs, Malware, or Cryptocurrency Mining.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
when the event matches Recipient Host (custom) is not N/A
when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potentially Hostile Email Host
TD_list: APPLY File or Folder Shared With an Email Hosted on a Potentially Hostile Domain on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Link Shared Events
AND when the event matches Recipient Host (custom) is not N/A
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Potentially Hostile Email Host
RED_list: Event name: File or Folder Shared With an Email Hosted on a Potentially Hostile Domain
Event description: Detected a file or a folder that is shared with an email that is hosted on a potentially hostile domain
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
